sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FERMI INC. (NASDAQ: FRMI) SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for investors of FERMI INC. (NASDAQ: FRMI), reminding them of an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased Fermi securities between October 1, 2025, and December 11, 2025, or pursuant to its October 2025 IPO, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal options, with the lead plaintiff deadline set for March 6, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that misrepresentations were made in the Company's Registration Statement regarding tenant demand at its Project Matador campus.

feed.title: Parker Scheduled to Present at Citi’s 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 19 at 11:20 a.m. Eastern Time
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation, a global leader in motion and control technologies, will present at Citi’s 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 19, 2026, at 11:20 a.m. Eastern time. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on their investor relations website. The company has a strong record of increasing its annual dividend for 69 consecutive years.

feed.title: Advocates ask regulators to reconsider Georgia Power expansion
feed.summary: Environmental groups are urging the Georgia Public Service Commission to reconsider its December approval of Georgia Power's energy expansion plan. They argue the expansion, primarily driven by anticipated data center demand and heavily reliant on natural gas, is excessive even by the utility's own predictions and could unfairly burden ordinary customers while contributing to climate change. The petition for reconsideration was added to the commission's agenda for the following week, with new commissioners advocating for due consideration of the request.

feed.title: From Crisis to Comeback: How Dow Inc Became 2026’s Unlikely Winner
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) stock has surprisingly surged 40% year-to-date in 2026 despite a significant net loss in 2025. This turnaround is attributed to an aggressive restructuring program targeting $2 billion in additional earnings through job cuts and AI investment. While the market shows confidence in the execution, potential risks include technical overbought indicators, recent insider selling, and cautious analyst ratings, suggesting investors are betting on future success rather than delivered results.

feed.title: This Dollar Tree Analyst Turns Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Friday
feed.summary: This article highlights five key stock downgrades by top Wall Street analysts on Friday. Among them, Dollar Tree (DLTR) saw a downgrade from "Market Perform" to "Underperform" by BMO Capital, with its price target reduced from $110 to $95. Other companies receiving downgrades include Domo (DOMO), IPG Photonics (IPGP), Pinterest (PINS), and US Foods Holding (USFD), along with revised price targets.

feed.title: Generac Holdings Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (GNRC) has significantly outperformed the broader market and the Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLI) over the past year, driven by strong growth in its Commercial & Industrial segment and strategic investments. Despite missing Wall Street's Q4 expectations for both EPS and revenue, analysts project a 27.9% EPS growth for fiscal 2026. The consensus analyst rating is a "Moderate Buy," with a price target of $255 from TD Cowen, suggesting potential upside.

feed.title: FactSet (FDS) Target Lowered by Wells Fargo Amid AI Concerns in Info Services
feed.summary: Wells Fargo lowered its price target on FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) to $215 from $265, maintaining an Underweight rating due to broader weakness in the information services sector amidst AI concerns. Despite this, Wells Fargo suggested the market's reaction might be overdone, seeing opportunities for companies with defensible proprietary data. FactSet recently announced a partnership with Kepler Cheuvreux to integrate its aftermarket research, enhanced by FactSet's AI tools, into its platform.

feed.title: TD Cowen Presented a Bullish Stance on Franklin Resources (BEN)
feed.summary: TD Cowen's Bill Katz upgraded his price recommendation for Franklin Resources (BEN) to $36 from $30, maintaining a Hold rating after reviewing the company's Q4 results and becoming more optimistic about its outlook. This bullish stance is further supported by Franklin Resources' new initiative with Binance, launching an institutional off-exchange collateral program that enhances security and capital efficiency for digital market participation. The program allows eligible institutional clients to use tokenized money market fund shares as collateral, reducing counterparty risks by keeping assets off-exchange while still facilitating trading on Binance.

feed.title: Booking Holdings stock hits 52-week low at $4,092
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. stock has hit a 52-week low of $4,092, representing a 30% drop from its 52-week high, with a 16.35% fall over the past year and a 23.38% drop in the last six months. Despite market challenges, the company maintains impressive 87% gross profit margins and a "GREAT" financial health score from InvestingPro. The article also notes recent positive third-quarter performance, varied analyst ratings from Goldman Sachs, Mizuho, KeyBanc, and Citizens, and leadership changes at KAYAK.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin stock hits all-time high at 647.57 USD
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin stock reached an all-time high of $647.57, reflecting a significant 50.63% increase over the past year. This achievement is attributed to strong investor confidence in the company's strategic initiatives and the rising global demand for advanced military technology. Analysts have raised price targets for Lockheed Martin, citing robust financial performance and growth in key defense segments.

feed.title: General Dynamics Paid Investors $1.50: Here’s What the Dividend Reveals
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) recently paid a quarterly dividend of $1.50 per share, extending a 27-year streak of consecutive payments. This dividend reflects a 5.6% increase from the previous year, supported by a strong financial foundation including $4 billion in free cash flow and a record $118 billion backlog. The company maintains a conservative 40.2% payout ratio, signaling sustainability and potential for continued growth despite near-term tariff impacts and increased capital expenditures.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Best Buy to $67 From $82, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Best Buy (BBY) to $67 from $82, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for the consumer electronics retailer, including Jefferies and JPMorgan, who also recently updated their targets and ratings. Best Buy specializes in the retail distribution of consumer electronic products across the United States and Canada.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) Stock Price Expected to Rise, DA Davidson Analyst Says
feed.summary: DA Davidson has increased its target price for Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) to $125 from $115, maintaining a "Buy" rating and suggesting a 19.49% upside. Despite this, the overall analyst consensus for AKAM is a "Hold" with an average price target of $97.50, which is below the current trading price. Company insiders have recently been net sellers, disposing of over 28,000 shares worth approximately $2.59 million in the last three months, though they still own about 2% of the company.

feed.title: Corteva Offers Cattle Producers Options To Improve Pasture Conditions
feed.summary: Corteva Agriscience is offering cattle producers two herbicide options, DuraCor® and NovaGraz™, to improve pasture conditions and enhance forage utilization. DuraCor® provides broadleaf weed control with no grazing restrictions, while NovaGraz™ allows for the preservation of white clover, offering flexibility in pasture management. These products aim to eliminate unwanted weeds and brush, enabling productive grasses to thrive for healthier cattle.

feed.title: Argus Research Upgrades McDonald's (MCD) to Buy with $380 Target
feed.summary: Argus Research has upgraded McDonald's (MCD) from Hold to Buy, setting a new price target of $380. This upgrade, announced by analyst John Staszak, reflects a positive outlook for the stock and follows similar positive adjustments from several other analysts. McDonald's, the world's largest restaurant brand, is receiving increased bullish sentiment from Wall Street, with an average target price of $343.52 among 33 analysts.

feed.title: Cytokinetics to Announce Fourth Quarter Results on February 24, 2026
feed.summary: Cytokinetics, Incorporated announced it is scheduled to report its fourth-quarter results on February 24, 2026, at 4:00 PM Eastern Time. Following the announcement, senior management will host a conference call at 4:30 PM Eastern Time to discuss financial results and provide business updates, which will be webcast on the company's website. The company also provided an overview of its pipeline, including MYQORZO™ (aficamten) for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, and investigational medicines omecamtiv mecarbil and ulacamten for heart failure.

feed.title: Ecolab (ECL) Analyst Rating Update: BMO Capital Boosts Price Tar
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for Ecolab (ECL) to $345.00, maintaining an "Outperform" rating, indicating continued confidence in the company's performance. This follows similar price target raises and "Outperform" or "Buy" ratings from other analysts like Exane BNP Paribas, Stifel, Citigroup, and RBC Capital. Ecolab, a global leader in cleaning and sanitation products, currently has an average target price of $317.63 from 20 analysts, suggesting a potential upside of 5.63%.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: BlackRock Rings Opening Bell to Honor Black History Month
feed.summary: The NYSE issued a pre-market update announcing that BlackRock rang the Opening Bell to honor Black History Month. The update also covered the current market's slip following the delayed January CPI Report, discussed opportunities for Once Upon A Farm post-IPO, and highlighted Lunar New Year celebrations at the NYSE. Additionally, Iris Acquisition Corp II rang the Closing Bell.

feed.title: Patrick Dumont to take charge of Las Vegas Sands on March 1st
feed.summary: Patrick Dumont is set to become the new chairman and CEO of Las Vegas Sands (LVS) on March 1st, succeeding Robert Goldstein. Dumont, who has been with LVS since 2010 and served as president and COO since January 2021, will also chair Sands China. He expressed excitement to build on the company's legacy and continue its investment programs and new developments, including an $8 billion project in Singapore.

feed.title: Immunic (IMUX) Price Target Lowered by D. Boral Capital to $4.00
feed.summary: D. Boral Capital has lowered its price target for Immunic (IMUX) from $8.00 to $4.00, representing a 50% decrease, while maintaining a 'Buy' rating. This adjustment reflects a shift in future performance expectations for the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company despite ongoing positive long-term outlooks from analysts. The average target price from 8 analysts is $5.38, suggesting a significant upside from its current price, and the consensus recommendation is "Outperform."

feed.title: Granite Construction Incorporated (NYSE:GVA) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.13
feed.summary: Granite Construction Incorporated (NYSE:GVA) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.13 per share, payable on April 15th to shareholders of record on March 31st. This dividend represents an annualized yield of 0.4% and is well-covered by the company's earnings, with a payout ratio of 8.6%. Analysts project the company's future payout ratio to be around 7.5% based on expected fiscal year earnings.

feed.title: Global Ship Lease Declares Q4 2025 Dividend on Strong Charter Backlog
feed.summary: Global Ship Lease (GSL), an owner and lessor of containerships with a 69-vessel fleet, has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.625 per Class A common share for Q4 2025, payable on March 6, 2026. This dividend is supported by the company's strong charter backlog of up to $2.40 billion as of September 30, 2025, with average remaining terms of 2.5 to 3.1 years. An analyst rating for GSL stock is a Buy with a $43.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates GSL as "Outperform" due to its financial performance and valuation.

feed.title: News | Expedia focuses on growth avenues followed by year-end outperformance
feed.summary: Expedia Group is strategically focusing on growth avenues, including expanding B2B partnerships, increasing supply, integrating AI, and strengthening consumer brands, after exceeding expectations in the fourth quarter of 2025. CEO Ariane Gorin highlighted significant advancements in product personalization, speed, and marketing effectiveness. The company anticipates continued growth in 2026, with projected increases in gross bookings and revenue, while maintaining a cautious outlook due to macroeconomic uncertainties.

feed.title: Fund Update: New $166.7M $LXP stock position opened by STATE STREET CORP
feed.summary: STATE STREET CORP has initiated a new $166.7 million position in LXP based on a recent SEC 13F filing for the 12-31-2025 report period. This move highlights significant institutional activity in LXP, with 185 investors adding the stock while 146 decreased their holdings. Analysts have issued "Market Outperform" ratings and price targets, with a median target of $11.25.

feed.title: BSX Posts Q4 Earnings: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (BSX) reported strong fourth-quarter 2025 results, exceeding guidance and consensus estimates with robust revenue growth driven by innovations and acquisitions, despite some challenges in Urology and Electrophysiology. While the stock has underperformed recently, the company's 2026 outlook is optimistic, projecting continued organic growth, particularly in Neuromodulation, and an expansion of its market presence through strategic partnerships and product approvals. Given its solid potential for rebound and attractive valuation relative to competitors, the article suggests retaining BSX as a 'Hold' stock.

feed.title: Behind the Scenes: Bringing Disney’s Mulan to Life Through Expertly Crafted Fragrance
feed.summary: Bath & Body Works has launched an expanded Disney Princess Collection, featuring new fragrances inspired by Disney Princess characters including Mulan. The Mulan fragrance, developed in collaboration with perfumer Frank Voelkl at DSM-Firmenich, captures Mulan's spirit with notes of magnolia blossom, fierce waters, and radiant apricot. The collection offers various product forms and accessories, available in stores and online.

feed.title: Fund Update: New $728.9M $Q stock position opened by STATE STREET CORP
feed.summary: STATE STREET CORP has opened a new $728.9 million position in $Q stock, as revealed in a recent SEC 13F filing for the Q4 2025 report period. This addition is part of a broader trend where 662 institutional investors increased their holdings, with Vanguard Group Inc. and Blackrock, Inc. also making significant additions. Analyst ratings for $Q are generally positive, with four firms issuing "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings and a median price target of $105.0.

feed.title: Nucor EVP query sells $1.46 million in NUE stock
feed.summary: Nucor Executive Vice President Kenneth Rex Query sold 7,452 shares of NUE common stock for approximately $1.46 million on February 11, 2026, retaining 76,628 shares. This sale follows Nucor's weaker-than-expected Q4 2025 earnings and revenue, a significant development for investors. Despite the financial miss, analyst ratings have remained unchanged.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (BRO) announces accelerated share repurchase, flags evolving market trends
feed.summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) has announced an accelerated share repurchase, indicating confidence in its financial position and future prospects. This move suggests the company is actively managing its capital structure and believes its stock is undervalued. The company also flagged evolving market trends, implying strategic adjustments or insights into the broader economic landscape relevant to its operations.

feed.title: SpaceX, OpenAI Drive 20% Gain in Blackstone Fund for the Wealthy
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc.'s private equity fund for wealthy individuals saw a significant 20% net gain last year, partly due to strategic investments in artificial intelligence companies. The fund holds stakes in major players like Elon Musk's SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI, with its Anthropic stake recently increasing to approximately $1 billion. These AI investments are distinct from the firm's institutional portfolios.

feed.title: Are U.S. small-caps finally back?
feed.summary: U.S. small-cap stocks have recently outperformed large-cap stocks, reversing a long period of underperformance. This rally is supported by accelerating earnings growth in small-cap companies, driven by factors such as lower interest rates, reduced trade uncertainty, improved lending, fiscal stimulus, and the broadening benefits of artificial intelligence. T. Rowe Price's Asset Allocation Committee views this small-cap rally as durable and has increased its overweight position in U.S. small-cap stocks.

feed.title: FedEx Joins Hedera Council to Support the Future of Digital Global Supply Chains
feed.summary: FedEx Corp. has announced its membership in the Hedera Council to help advance trusted digital infrastructure for global supply chains. This move aims to enable global commerce to operate at the speed of data, reducing friction in cross-border trade through secure data verification. As a council member, FedEx will contribute operational expertise and participate in the governance of the Hedera network, which provides an enterprise-grade distributed ledger technology for digital ecosystems.

feed.title: Equinor Launches NOK 1.97 Billion Share Buy-Back for Incentive Plans
feed.summary: Equinor ASA has announced a share buy-back program worth up to NOK 1.971 billion, involving the repurchase of up to 19.6 million shares on the Oslo Stock Exchange. This initiative, running from February 2026 to January 2027, aims to provide shares for employee and management share-based incentive plans, aligning with the company’s capital management strategy and regulatory frameworks. The buy-back is conducted under safe harbor rules, with part of it covered by an existing shareholder authorization and the remainder contingent on a new 2026 mandate.

feed.title: Xylem Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
feed.summary: Xylem Inc. (XYL) stock has underperformed the broader market and its sector due to weaker-than-expected demand for water treatment equipment and subdued guidance, despite beating revenue expectations in Q4 fiscal 2025. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus, with updated price targets suggesting a significant upside. However, analysts have lowered price targets post-earnings due to differing market conditions.

feed.title: Arista Stock Surges After Q4 Beat, Q1 Sales Outlook Tops Estimates
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) stock surged after reporting better-than-expected Q4 financial results and providing strong Q1 sales guidance. The company's adjusted earnings of 82 cents per share and revenue of $2.48 billion surpassed analyst estimates. Arista also announced new R4 series platforms for AI and data centers, and expanded its AVA capabilities.

feed.title: 'It's legit': AT&T to revive closed flagship store in San Francisco Union Square
feed.summary: AT&T plans to reopen its flagship retail store at 1 Powell St. in San Francisco's Union Square, reversing a closure from 2023. This resurgence marks a trend in the area, as other luxury retailers have also chosen to reopen previously shuttered downtown flagships. The move signifies a renewed investment in the prominent retail district.

feed.title: Supermicro Announces Participation in Upcoming Investor Events
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (Nasdaq: SMCI) announced its participation in three upcoming investor conferences in March 2026: the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference, Keybanc Emerging Technology Summit, and Loop Capital Markets 7th Annual Investor Conference. The company will be holding 1x1 meetings at each event. Supermicro is a global leader in Application-Optimized Total IT Solutions, providing innovation for Enterprise, Cloud, AI, and 5G Telco/Edge IT Infrastructure.

feed.title: Supermicro Announces Participation in Upcoming Investor Events
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (Nasdaq: SMCI) will be participating in three upcoming investor conferences in March 2026. These events include the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference, the Keybanc Emerging Technology Summit, and the Loop Capital Markets 7th Annual Investor Conference, all featuring 1x1 meetings.

feed.title: Uncovering Opportunities in Emerging Market Debt
feed.summary: Samy Muaddi, CFA, highlights emerging market debt (EMD) as a significant investment opportunity capable of driving economic development through infrastructure financing and job creation. He emphasizes that EMD investing is a team sport, requiring cognitive diversity and deep, on-the-ground research beyond mere headlines, to navigate the complexities and unknowns of developing countries. T. Rowe Price’s team comprises 60 professionals from 23 nationalities, conducting over 200 site visits annually to inform investment decisions across 70 countries.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: BlackRock Rings Opening Bell to Honor Black History Month
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update, noting market slips due to an anticipated 2.5% inflation year-over-year. BlackRock's Black Professional & Allies Network rang the Opening Bell to celebrate U.S. Black History Month, while Iris Acquisition Corp II rang the Closing Bell. The NYSE also celebrated Lunar New Year.

feed.title: American Tower Credit Rating Analysis
feed.summary: American Tower (AMT) currently holds a BBB+ credit rating, indicating improved debt management with a net leverage ratio of 4.9 times, although it falls short of an A rating. Despite high total debt at $37 billion, the company demonstrates strong cash flow with an adjusted EBITDA exceeding $7.2 billion annually. Legal disputes with AT&T Mexico and DISH, along with the need to balance growth spending and debt reduction, are key factors influencing future credit rating upgrades.

feed.title: Immunic to raise up to $400M to fund late-stage MS trials, commercial push
feed.summary: Immunic Inc. announced a private placement aiming to raise up to $400 million to finance the late-stage development of its multiple sclerosis pipeline and support its transition into a commercial-stage company. The funding will largely go towards completing Phase 3 trials for vidofludimus calcium and expanding preparatory commercial infrastructure. Concurrently, Immunic is undergoing leadership changes, with its co-founder and CEO Daniel Vitt moving to a senior executive role focusing on scientific strategy as the company seeks a new CEO with commercial MS experience.

feed.title: Bank of America reaffirms buy on Amcor (AMCR), raises target to $56
feed.summary: Bank of America has reiterated its "buy" rating on Amcor (AMCR) and increased its price target for the stock to $56. This indicates a positive outlook from the analytical firm regarding Amcor's future performance. The specific reasons for the target raise and reaffirmation are not detailed in this snippet.

feed.title: The Analyst Verdict: Broadcom In The Eyes Of 26 Experts
feed.summary: Over the past three months, 26 analysts have evaluated Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO), leading to an average 12-month price target of $455.46, an increase of 7.81% from the previous average. The company demonstrates strong financial performance with high market capitalization, significant revenue growth, and excellent net margin, ROE, and ROA, though its debt-to-equity ratio is higher than the industry average. Broadcom operates as a major semiconductor company with a substantial presence in infrastructure software, including custom AI chips, and is the result of strategic consolidations.

feed.title: Schwab reports $27.8 billion in core net new assets for January
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corporation reported attracting $27.8 billion in core net new assets in January 2026, consistent with typical seasonal patterns. The financial services giant saw total client assets reach $12.15 trillion, an 18% increase year-over-year, and opened 476,000 new brokerage accounts. This performance highlights Schwab's continued growth, strong financial standing, and potential upside according to valuation models, having maintained dividend payments for 38 consecutive years.

feed.title: FedEx Corp. Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: The Board of Directors of FedEx Corp. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.45 per share on common stock, maintaining its commitment to stockholder value. This dividend is payable on April 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of March 9, 2026. FedEx, with $90 billion in annual revenue, provides global transportation, e-commerce, and business services and aims for carbon-neutral operations by 2040.

feed.title: FedEx Corp. Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.45 per share. The dividend is payable on April 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of March 9, 2026, reinforcing the company's commitment to delivering stockholder value. FedEx provides a broad range of transportation, e-commerce, and business services globally, with an annual revenue of $90 billion.

feed.title: DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: DexCom, Inc. reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with revenue exceeding guidance and EPS beating expectations. The company highlighted the successful broad rollout of its DexCom G7 15-day system and the upcoming launch of DexCom Smart Basal. CEO Jacob Steven Leach emphasized continued innovation, improved customer experience, and significant international expansion opportunities, particularly anticipating broader access for type 2 non-insulin users in the US and globally.

feed.title: Central Cee and Su Yiming front UGG’s new clogs — just 2,000 pairs worldwide
feed.summary: UGG (a division of Deckers Brands) has launched new clogs and mules for Spring 2026, featuring new silhouettes derived from the Tasman line. The campaign for these new styles, including the Otzo Clog, Tasman Lace, and Tasman Albite, is fronted by global rap sensation Central Cee and Olympic snowboarding champion Su Yiming. Notably, the Tasman Albite is a limited-edition, almost entirely handmade shoe with only 2,000 pairs available globally.

feed.title: American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings of $1.19 per share, exceeding expectations and contributing to a full-year operating earnings of $5.97 per share, above their guidance. The company reaffirmed its 2026 full-year operating earnings guidance and a long-term earnings growth rate of 7-9% through 2030, driven by significant load growth and a robust $72 billion five-year capital plan. AEP has doubled its incremental contracted load outlook to 56 gigawatts, primarily due to increased data center and industrial demand in key service territories, and is actively working on regulatory reforms and infrastructure investments to manage this growth.
